falsification_conditions.condition: The price of the asset rises above the 10% resistance level established during the bottom_2024_aug pattern
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key resistance would indicate a bullish trend, directly contradicting the expectation of a bottom formation and invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume increases by 50% above the 30-day average within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained high volume during a price rally would signal strong buying pressure, refuting the current HOLD verdict by indicating a potential reversal from the expected bottom scenario.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score rises to 70 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 70 would confirm a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the bottom_2024_aug pattern and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict by proving a different market dynamic is at play.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
